hero.title: Jezreel Valley Select Extra Virgin Olive Oil
hero.subtitle: Cold Pressed · Hand Picked

about.heading: IT'S ALL ABOUT THOSE OLIVES
about.body: Extra Virgin Olive Oil is simply the juice of fantastically healthy olives. And that's all it is—so the quality of the oil depends entirely on the quality of the olives.

robust.title: ROBUST 100% CALIFORNIA EXTRA VIRGIN OLIVE OIL
robust.subtitle: Robust
robust.description: Our Robust blend is cold-pressed from hand-picked California olives at peak ripeness. Intensely flavored with a peppery finish — perfect for drizzling over grilled meats, hearty salads, and crusty bread.

classic.title: CLASSIC 100% CALIFORNIA EXTRA VIRGIN OLIVE OIL
classic.subtitle: Classic
classic.description: A beautifully balanced extra virgin olive oil with a smooth, buttery character and mild fruitiness. Versatile enough for everyday cooking, baking, and dipping.

mild.title: MILD 100% CALIFORNIA EXTRA VIRGIN OLIVE OIL
mild.subtitle: Mild
mild.description: Delicate and light with a gentle fruity aroma. Our Mild blend is ideal for dressings, marinades, and any dish where you want the olive oil to complement rather than dominate.

tin.title: 100% CALIFORNIA EXTRA VIRGIN OLIVE OIL TIN
tin.subtitle: Classic Tin
tin.description: The same award-winning California extra virgin olive oil, packaged in a traditional tin that protects against light and preserves freshness longer. A beautiful addition to any kitchen.
